brand_identity.name: Odapto
brand_identity.mission: Empower teams with energetic efficiency and structured clarity.
brand_identity.archetype: The Performance Pro mixed with Vibrant Play

usage_rules.primary_action: Use Primary Orange (#E67E4C) for main CTAs (Create Board, Sign Up, Save).
usage_rules.secondary_action: Use Secondary Teal (#3A8B84) for success states, badges, and decorative accents.
usage_rules.neutral: Use Zinc grays for text and borders. Avoid pure black.
usage_rules.dark_mode: Use Zinc-950 for background, Zinc-900 for cards. Orange text on dark bg must pass APCA contrast.

landing_page.grid: Use the 'Tetris' Bento Grid for features (md:grid-cols-12).
landing_page.hero: Split layout: Left text (H1 + Sub + CTA), Right Visual (Image/Graphic). Mobile: Stacked.

dashboard.kanban_board: Horizontal scrolling container. Columns fixed width (w-72 or w-80). Snap-scroll on mobile.

responsive.mobile: Stack columns vertically. Use bottom sheet (Drawer) instead of Modals on mobile.
responsive.tablet: Sidebar becomes an icon rail. Touch targets min 44px.

buttons.marketing: rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.app: rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium shadow-sm transition-colors

cards.style: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-xl border border-border/50 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
cards.marketing_card: p-8 bg-gradient-to-br from-white to-gray-50 dark:from-zinc-900 dark:to-zinc-950 border-0 shadow-xl

inputs.style: rounded-md border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-2 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

navigation.topbar: h-14 border-b border-border bg-background/95 backdrop-blur supports-[backdrop-filter]:bg-background/60 px-4 flex items-center gap-4

gradients.hero_bg: bg-gradient-to-br from-orange-50 via-white to-teal-50 dark:from-zinc-900 dark:via-zinc-900 dark:to-zinc-800

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: bg-white/70 dark:bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 dark:border-white/10

animations.micro_interactions: Add subtle scale (0.98) on button click (active). Pulse effect on notifications.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over orange/teal meets WCAG AA (4.5:1). Use white text on primary buttons.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus ring (2px solid #E67E4C) on all interactive elements.
accessibility.screen_readers: Use aria-label for icon-only buttons. Semantic HTML (nav, main, aside).

instructions_to_main_agent: Configure tailwind.config.js to extend colors with 'primary' (#E67E4C) and 'secondary' (#3A8B84).
Set up 'Outfit' font for headings and 'Inter' for body.
Create a reusable 'Button' component that accepts variants (primary, secondary, outline, ghost).
Implement the Layout Wrapper to handle Sidebar state and Topbar.
Ensure all Drag-and-Drop lists have touch support (use @hello-pangea/dnd).
Add 'data-testid' to all key interactive elements.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
